subject: Larvesta, a small white larval Pokemon with horn-like appendages, resting on cracked dry earth
description: A small, pale white larva creature sits on dry cracked earth in the foreground. It has a rounded body with small horn-like protrusions visible and appears compact and still rather than in motion. The background features an orange-red barren tree with sparse branches against a warm, faded sky in amber and muted orange tones. The overall feel is arid and desolate, with a sun-bleached palette that suits the creature's lore about being born from the sun.
foreground: Small white larval creature on cracked dry ground
background: Barren orange-red tree, cracked earth, warm amber sky
